name: update_profile
description: Update the currently signed-in user's display name, photo URL, or remove profile attributes. Requires a valid ID token. Can also be used to change the user's password or email.

parameters.name: idToken
parameters.description: The ID token of the currently signed-in user.

parameters.name: displayName
parameters.description: New display name for the user.

parameters.name: photoUrl
parameters.description: New photo URL for the user's profile picture.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: New email address for the user.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: New password for the user. Must be at least 6 characters.

parameters.name: deleteAttribute
parameters.description: List of attributes to remove. Possible values: 'DISPLAY_NAME', 'PHOTO_URL'.

parameters.name: returnSecureToken
parameters.description: Whether to return a new ID token and refresh token.
